Work Experience

Leadership, support, and teaching

Head Resident Advisor

Residential Life, Allegheny College

Aug 2025 - Present

Supervise and mentor 3 Resident Advisors while overseeing community development and resident support for a building of 70+ residents.

  • Planned and executed 12+ annual programs, increasing engagement by 15%.
  • Led conflict resolution efforts to maintain an inclusive and safe living environment.

Information Technology Office Assistant

Information Technology Department, Allegheny College

Sep 2024 - Present

Provided first-line technical support for campus users and helped diagnose a wide range of device and connectivity issues.

  • Resolved 50+ student technical issues related to macOS, Windows, and network connectivity.
  • Improved system reliability and student satisfaction through responsive ticket handling.

Teaching Assistant

CIS Department, Allegheny College

Jan 2025 - Present

Supported students in understanding technical concepts, project requirements, and assignment workflows.

  • Guided 20+ students through course material and project expectations.
  • Held office hours and appointments to help students work through class problems.

Fellow Leader

Code with Chompers, Allegheny College

Jan 2025 - Present

Coordinated lesson plans and led volunteers delivering computational activities for local students.

  • Led a team of 5 volunteers to improve STEM engagement by 20% for 70+ students.
  • Built an engaging environment where kids could explore programming and problem-solving.
